Use this data source to query ECS key pairs.

Example Usage

```hcl
data "edgenext_ecs_key_pairs" "example" {
  limit = 10
}
```

Argument Reference

* `limit` - (Optional) Maximum number of results.

Attributes Reference

* `id` - Stable query ID generated by provider.
* `total` - Matched key pair count.
* `key_pairs` - Key pair list. Common fields include `name`, `fingerprint`, `public_key`, and `type`.
